debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝³ : DecidableEq α
inst✝² : MeasurableSingletonClass α
alg✝ : Algorithm α ℝ
ν✝ : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsMarkovKernel ν✝
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
a : α
n : ℕ
⊢ IndepFun (rewardByCount a (n + 1)) (fun ω i => rewardByCount a (↑i) ω) (Bandit.measure alg✝ ν✝)

failed_attempts:
let π : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) → (ℕ → α → ℝ) := Prod.snd
  have h_map : 𝔓.map π = Bandit.streamMeasure ν := by
    rw [Bandit.measure, Measure.snd_bind, Measure.snd_map, Measure.map_id]; rfl
  rw [indepFun_iff_map_comp measurable_snd (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), h_map]
  by_cases hn : n = 0
  · subst hn
    simp only [rewardByCount, Nat.zero_sub, Iic_zero, Finset.coe_singleton, Set.mem_singleton_iff,
      forall_eq, Nat.cast_zero, dite_true]
    exact indepFun_const_right _ (fun _ ↦ 0)
  have h_indep : iIndepFun (fun _ ↦ inferInstance) (fun k ω ↦ ω k) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    rw [Bandit.streamMeasure]; exact Measure.iIndepFun_infinitePi _
  refine IndepFun.comp (h_indep.indepFun_prod n (Iic (n - 1)) ?_) ?_ ?_ (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  · rw [disjoint_singleton_left, mem_Iic, not_le]
    exact Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn) (by simp)
  · exact fun x ↦ x a
  · refine measurable_pi_iff.mpr (fun ⟨i, hi⟩ ↦ ?_)
    simp only [rewardByCount, Function.comp_apply, Subtype.coe_mk]
    split_ifs with h_zero
    · exact measurable_const
    · have : i - 1 ∈ Iic (n - 1) := by
        rw [mem_Iic, Nat.le_sub_iff_add_le (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_zero)]
        exact hi
      exact (measurable_pi_apply ⟨i - 1, this⟩).eval_const a
